creator: ashp@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi, did you ever manage to get FreeBSD working with custom partitions?  It 
works for most people, and should work for you.  I'd suggest not creating a 
/tmp partition, and also you need to create a swap partition. 

I normally create: / (128M), swap (2*your memory), /var (1024M) and /usr (rest).
